seoTitle: Glen Oak vs Glen Ward — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Glen Oak and Glen Ward. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Glen Oak vs Glen Ward: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Glen Oak and Glen Ward.
heading: Glen Oak vs Glen Ward — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Glen Oak, New South Wales and Glen Ward, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Glen Oak has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Glen Ward (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Glen Oak or Glen Ward safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Glen Oak has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Glen Ward scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Glen Oak scores 53/100 for bushfire risk. Glen Ward scores 65/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Glen Oak or Glen Ward?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Glen Oak has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.85% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
